title: Ultrasonic Parking / Obstacle Distance Alarm
description: Measure distance to an object with an ultrasonic sensor and trigger a buzzer/LED warning as it gets closer, mimicking a car parking sensor or machine-guard proximity alarm.

title: PIR-Based Automated Zone Lighting
description: Detect motion in a work zone and automatically switch lighting or a warning beacon on/off via a relay, similar to warehouse aisle lighting control.

title: Temperature & Humidity Environment Logger
description: Continuously read temperature/humidity and display it locally, a first step toward environment monitoring for storage rooms or server closets.

title: Smart Streetlight / Light-Level Controller
description: Switch outdoor or facility lighting automatically based on ambient light level, a simple analogue of smart streetlight control.

title: Gas Leak Detection & Alarm
description: Detect combustible gas/smoke concentration and trigger an audible alarm plus optional relay to cut power or open a ventilation fan, a scaled-down industrial gas safety system.

title: RFID-Based Access/Asset Control
description: Grant or deny access to a cabinet/gate by scanning an RFID tag, driving a servo-actuated latch - a simplified version of restricted-area access control on a factory floor.

title: Line-Following Conveyor Guidance Bot
description: Build a small robot that follows a line, illustrating the guidance logic used by AGVs (automated guided vehicles) that move material between stations on a factory floor.

title: Servo-Actuated Sorting Gate
description: Detect an object passing on a chute/conveyor and use a servo flap to divert it into one of two bins, the core mechanism behind simple sorting stations.

title: Digital Weighing & Batching Station
description: Weigh material on a load cell and automatically cut off a feed relay (e.g. driving a solenoid/valve) once a target batch weight is reached - the basis of automated batching/dosing lines.

title: Two-Axis Pan-Tilt Inspection Camera
description: Mount a camera on a two-servo pan-tilt bracket for remote visual inspection of machinery or hard-to-reach equipment, controllable via serial or Bluetooth.
learning_outcomes: Camera mounting for inspection use cases

title: Stepper-Driven Linear Positioning Rail
description: Build a belt or leadscrew-driven carriage that moves to precise positions using a NEMA17 stepper with homing via a limit switch - a miniature version of a CNC/pick-and-place axis.

title: Closed-Loop DC Motor Speed Controller
description: Use encoder feedback and PWM to hold a DC motor at a target RPM despite load changes, introducing PID control the way it's used on conveyor and pump drives.

title: IoT Machine Condition Dashboard
description: Stream vibration (via IMU), temperature, and humidity readings from a machine to a cloud/web dashboard over Wi-Fi - an entry point into predictive-maintenance style condition monitoring.

title: Remote Current & Power Monitor
description: Non-invasively monitor current draw of a motor or panel circuit and report it wirelessly, useful for spotting overload or abnormal running conditions on equipment.

title: Water Flow & Leak Monitoring System
description: Track flow rate through a pipe and automatically shut a solenoid valve if flow exceeds an expected leak threshold, modeling automated leak-protection valves used in plant utilities.

title: Automated pH Dosing Controller
description: Continuously read pH of a fluid (e.g. a tank) and dose acid/base via solenoid-controlled valves to hold pH in a target band, similar to dosing skids used in water treatment.

title: 3-DOF Pick-and-Place Robotic Arm
description: Program inverse kinematics for a multi-servo arm to pick objects from one location and place them at another, a scaled-down version of pick-and-place robots on assembly lines.

title: CNC-Style 2-Axis Plotter/Engraver
description: Coordinate two stepper axes with G-code-like commands to draw or engrave patterns, covering the same multi-axis coordination used in real CNC machines.

title: AGV: Autonomous Guided Cart with Obstacle Avoidance
description: Combine line/path following with ultrasonic obstacle avoidance and IMU-based heading correction to build a small autonomous cart, mirroring warehouse AGVs.

title: Vibration-Based Predictive Maintenance Node
description: Sample vibration and current signatures from a running motor, compute simple frequency-domain features, and flag anomalies compared to a healthy baseline - an entry-level predictive-maintenance sensor node.

title: PLC-Based Traffic Light / Sequencing Simulator
description: Program a small PLC to sequence outputs (e.g. simulated traffic lights or a multi-step process) with timers and interlocks, a direct on-ramp to real industrial ladder-logic control.

title: Conveyor Belt Speed & Jam Detection
description: Drive a small conveyor and monitor belt speed via encoder plus motor current draw to detect jams or slippage and auto-stop the line, mirroring safety interlocks on real conveyors.

title: LoRa-Based Remote Tank Level Monitor
description: Measure tank/silo fill level ultrasonically and transmit it over long-range LoRa to a base station, suited to remote sites without Wi-Fi coverage.

title: Multi-Zone Temperature Control Oven/Chamber
description: Control multiple independently-heated zones to hold different setpoints using PID loops per zone and solid-state relay switching, similar to reflow ovens or curing chambers.

title: Barcode/RFID Inventory Check-In Station
description: Scan RFID-tagged parts/bins as they move through a station and log/report check-in events to a small dashboard, a simplified warehouse inventory tracking point.

title: Pressure-Monitored Pneumatic Test Rig
description: Monitor air pressure in a small pneumatic circuit and open/close a solenoid valve to hold pressure within a safe band, an introductory analogue of pneumatic process control.

title: Beginner Bluetooth-Controlled Robotic Gripper
description: Control a single-servo gripper from a phone app over Bluetooth, a first hands-on step into robotic manipulation before moving to multi-DOF arms.

title: Emergency Stop & Safety Interlock Trainer
description: Wire a latching e-stop circuit that cuts power to a motor/relay output and requires manual reset, teaching the fail-safe interlock pattern used throughout industrial safety systems.
